expectations.text: Uses ast-grep rewrite (--rewrite flag or YAML fix) to perform the replacement
The rewrite uses meta-variables to capture the console.error arguments
expectations.evidence: Uses $$$ARGS to capture all arguments to console.error and pass to this.logger.error

expectations.text: The output shows the original and transformed code
expectations.evidence: Diff output shows - console.error and + this.logger.error side by side

expectations.text: The transformation preserves the arguments passed to console.error
expectations.evidence: ARGS: 'Failed to load users:' and err -- both preserved in replacement
